entries.caption: First steps on the Del Norte! Climbed out of Irun, got my first coastal views, and collapsed into a hostel bunk in San Sebastian with sore feet and a huge grin.
Rolling Basque hills, sheep, and a beautiful clifftop walk into Zarautz. Grabbed pintxos at sunset — this is going to be a good month.
Tough climb out of Getaria but the views from the ridge were unreal. Deba’s little river town vibe is perfect for tonight.
